questionHtml:
A human organ is being prepared for transplant. In what type of solution must it be bathed?

A. A hypertonic solution

B. A hypotonic solution

C. Pure water containing no solutes

D. A solution with the same osmolarity as the organ tissue

meta.title: A human organ is being prepared for transplant. In what type of solution must it be bathed? A. A hypertonic solution B. A hypotonic solution C. Pure water containing no solutes D.
breadcrumbLabels: D2.3.7. Medical applications of isotonic solutions
